etymology.description: 直(直) (zhí, 'looking forward') + 心(心) (xīn, 'heart, mind') = virtue
etymology.interpretation: The character 惪 combines 直(直) (zhí, 'looking forward') with 心(心) (xīn, 'heart, mind') to represent virtue through a forward-looking heart or mind. This reflects an ideal of internal moral integrity and direction.
